sentences.arabic: الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ تِقْنِيَّةٌ حَدِيثَةٌ تُغَيِّرُ الْعَالَمَ.
sentences.translation: Vještačka inteligencija je moderna tehnologija koja mijenja svijet.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence is a modern technology that is changing the world.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَطِيعُ الْحَوَاسِيبُ الْآنَ التَّعَلُّمَ وَحَلَّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ الصَّعْبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Računari sada mogu učiti i rješavati teške probleme.
sentences.translationEn: Computers can now learn and solve difficult problems.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُ شَرِكَاتٌ كَثِيرَةٌ هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةَ لِتَحْسِينِ خِدْمَاتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Mnoge kompanije koriste ovu tehnologiju za poboljšanje svojih usluga.
sentences.translationEn: Many companies use this technology to improve their services.
